welcomeCloudSyncBodyShort: Backs up lessons, streaks and bookmarks encrypted, restores them on any device when you sign in.
welcomeCloudSyncOffRisk: Without an account, web progress lives only in this browser. Clearing cookies or site data can erase months of study.
welcomeEnterGardenLicenseReminder: All shared trees are free to reuse (CC BY-SA 4.0).
